name: lit-review-agent-v2
description: Standalone Lit Review Agent — PDF parse + OpenRouter
author: USC

scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && echo 'Frontend built to app/public'
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && node scripts/bundle-electron.mjs && node scripts/bundle-server.mjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:electron && npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder --mac --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac-arm64: npm run build:electron && npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac-arm64:signed: npm run build:electron && npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml --config electron/builder.signing-mac.yml
scripts.dist:mac-x64: npm run build:electron && cross-env TARGET_ARCH=x64 npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder --mac --x64 --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac-x64:signed: npm run build:electron && cross-env TARGET_ARCH=x64 npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder --mac --x64 --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml --config electron/builder.signing-mac.yml
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:electron && npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder --win --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml
scripts.dist:win-x64: npm run build:electron && npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder --win --x64 --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml
scripts.dist:win-arm64: npm run build:electron && cross-env TARGET_ARCH=arm64 npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder --win --arm64 --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml
scripts.dist:all: npm run build:electron && npm run rebuild:app-native && electron-builder -mw --projectDir . --config electron/builder.yml
scripts.package: npm run build && echo 'Run app with: cd app && npm run dev'
